firm_description: Small boutique underwriter focused exclusively on Tennessee and neighboring states. Strong local relationships with school districts and small cities. Retail-only distribution through local bank network. Cannot handle large or complex deals.

strategic_priorities: Expand into small city GO market in KY and AL
sectors_exiting: Revenue bonds — too complex for current team

distribution_profile.retail_reach: Moderate — 15 Tennessee community banks and credit unions
distribution_profile.bank_qualified_demand: Very strong — local banks actively seek BQ paper

bidding_capabilities.notes: Limited to simple GO structures. No NIC or net effective rate experience.
